violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in the service area. An employee was observed rinsing equipment in the service area hand sink. A dishwasher was connected to the hand washing sink in the basement. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener brought to dish wash area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Salsa was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC stated it was from an event, PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -Cola refrigerator gaskets -pastry display case (taped corner). New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The wall in the stairwell area (over mop sink) is in poor repair, observed with a hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Pastries and cheese cake packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, best by or use by date and the business name/address. Pastry binder that discloses all types of pastries and cheesecakes with ingredients discussed with owner. Owner to forward proof of binder. Items removed from sale at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
The basement floors under shelving was observed with old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Wall by staircase was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
